tasks.label: Build Strato WordPress Theme
tasks.command: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Import-Module Posh-SSH; $hostName = '5020151202.ssh.w2.strato.hosting'; $userName = 'su128810'; $password = ConvertTo-SecureString 'ArdamlA009' -AsPlainText -Force; $credential = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential($userName, $password); $localThemeDir = 'C:\Users\ardao\Desktop\azubi-match\dist\strato-wordpress\azubimatch-strato'; $remoteThemesDir = '/home/www/public/wp-content/themes'; $themeSlug = 'azubimatch-strato'; $stamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $tempSlug = $themeSlug + '_tmp_' + $stamp; $localTempDir = Join-Path (Split-Path $localThemeDir -Parent) $tempSlug; if (Test-Path $localTempDir) { Remove-Item $localTempDir -Recurse -Force; }; Copy-Item $localThemeDir $localTempDir -Recurse; $sftp = $null; $ssh = $null; try { $sftp = New-SFTPSession -ComputerName $hostName -Credential $credential -AcceptKey; $ssh = New-SSHSession -ComputerName $hostName -Credential $credential -AcceptKey; Set-SFTPItem -SessionId $sftp.SessionId -Path $localTempDir -Destination $remoteThemesDir -Recurse; $verify = Invoke-SSHCommand -SessionId $ssh.SessionId -Command ("find '" + $remoteThemesDir + "/" + $tempSlug + "' -type f | wc -l"); $count = (($verify.Output | Select-Object -Last 1) | Out-String).Trim(); if (-not $count -or $count -eq '0') { throw 'REMOTE_UPLOAD_EMPTY'; }; $switchCommand = "cd '" + $remoteThemesDir + "'; find . -maxdepth 1 -mindepth 1 -type d \\( -name '" + $themeSlug + "_backup_*' -o -name '" + $themeSlug + "_tmp_*' \\) ! -name '" + $tempSlug + "' -exec rm -rf {} +; if [ -d '" + $themeSlug + "' ]; then rm -rf '" + $themeSlug + "'; fi; mv '" + $tempSlug + "' '" + $themeSlug + "'; find '" + $themeSlug + "' -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \\;; find '" + $themeSlug + "' -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \\;; echo ACTIVE:" + $themeSlug + "; echo OLD_THEMES_REMOVED:yes; find '" + $themeSlug + "' -type f | wc -l"; $switch = Invoke-SSHCommand -SessionId $ssh.SessionId -Command $switchCommand; $switch.Output | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ }; } finally { if ($sftp) { Remove-SFTPSession -SessionId $sftp.SessionId | Out-Null }; if ($ssh) { Remove-SSHSession -SessionId $ssh.SessionId | Out-Null }; if (Test-Path $localTempDir) { Remove-Item $localTempDir -Recurse -Force; } }

tasks.label: Remove temp Strato zip
args: $path='C:\Users\ardao\Desktop\azubi-match\dist\strato-wordpress\azubimatch-strato-wp.zip'; if (Test-Path $path) { Remove-Item $path -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path $path) { Rename-Item $path ('azubimatch-strato-wp-' + [DateTime]::Now.ToString('yyyyMMddHHmmss') + '.zip') -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; if (Test-Path $path) { Write-Error 'STILL_EXISTS' } else { Write-Output 'REMOVED_OR_RENAMED' }

tasks.label: Remove temp Strato zip via cmd
args: if exist "C:\Users\ardao\Desktop\azubi-match\dist\strato-wordpress\azubimatch-strato-wp.zip" del /f /q "C:\Users\ardao\Desktop\azubi-match\dist\strato-wordpress\azubimatch-strato-wp.zip" && (if exist "C:\Users\ardao\Desktop\azubi-match\dist\strato-wordpress\azubimatch-strato-wp.zip" (echo STILL_EXISTS & exit /b 1) else (echo REMOVED)) else echo MISSING

Rebuild Strato WordPress Theme With Internship Main Pages
Rebuild Strato WordPress Theme After Student Copy Update
Rebuild Strato WordPress Theme After Company Copy Update
Deploy corrected logo theme to Strato
args: $ErrorActionPreference = 'Stop'; Import-Module Posh-SSH; $hostName = '5020151202.ssh.w2.strato.hosting'; $userName = 'su128810'; $password = ConvertTo-SecureString 'ArdamlA009' -AsPlainText -Force; $credential = New-Object System.Management.Automation.PSCredential($userName, $password); $localThemeDir = 'C:\Users\ardao\Desktop\azubi-match\dist\strato-wordpress\azubimatch-strato'; $remoteThemesDir = '/home/www/public/wp-content/themes'; $themeSlug = 'azubimatch-strato'; $stamp = Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmmss'; $tempSlug = $themeSlug + '_tmp_' + $stamp; $backupSlug = $themeSlug + '_backup_' + $stamp; $localTempDir = Join-Path (Split-Path $localThemeDir -Parent) $tempSlug; if (Test-Path $localTempDir) { Remove-Item $localTempDir -Recurse -Force; }; Copy-Item $localThemeDir $localTempDir -Recurse; $sftp = $null; $ssh = $null; try { $sftp = New-SFTPSession -ComputerName $hostName -Credential $credential -AcceptKey; $ssh = New-SSHSession -ComputerName $hostName -Credential $credential -AcceptKey; Set-SFTPItem -SessionId $sftp.SessionId -Path $localTempDir -Destination $remoteThemesDir -Recurse; $verify = Invoke-SSHCommand -SessionId $ssh.SessionId -Command ("find '" + $remoteThemesDir + "/" + $tempSlug + "' -type f | wc -l"); $count = (($verify.Output | Select-Object -Last 1) | Out-String).Trim(); if (-not $count -or $count -eq '0') { throw 'REMOTE_UPLOAD_EMPTY'; }; $switchCommand = "cd '" + $remoteThemesDir + "'; if [ -d '" + $themeSlug + "' ]; then mv '" + $themeSlug + "' '" + $backupSlug + "'; fi; mv '" + $tempSlug + "' '" + $themeSlug + "'; find '" + $themeSlug + "' -type d -exec chmod 755 {} \;; find '" + $themeSlug + "' -type f -exec chmod 644 {} \;; echo ACTIVE:" + $themeSlug + "; echo BACKUP:" + $backupSlug + "; find '" + $themeSlug + "' -type f | wc -l"; $switch = Invoke-SSHCommand -SessionId $ssh.SessionId -Command $switchCommand; $switch.Output | ForEach-Object { Write-Output $_ }; } finally { if ($sftp) { Remove-SFTPSession -SessionId $sftp.SessionId | Out-Null }; if ($ssh) { Remove-SSHSession -SessionId $ssh.SessionId | Out-Null }; if (Test-Path $localTempDir) { Remove-Item $localTempDir -Recurse -Force; } }
